requirement_topic.en: EVSE Safety Evidence — UL 2594 / UL 2202 Direction and Hurricane-Prone Installation
requirement_topic.zh: EVSE安全证据——UL 2594 / UL 2202方向及飓风多发环境安装
requirement_topic.zht: EVSE安全證據——UL 2594 / UL 2202方向及颶風多發環境安裝

summary.en: For the Bahamas, EVSE safety evidence should follow the US-direction charger safety framework normally expected for a 120/240 V 60 Hz Americas market. AC EVSE is commonly evaluated to UL 2594, DC charging equipment to UL 2202, and installation details to the locally accepted electrical code, project specification, and utility requirements. Because the Bahamas is a hurricane-prone coastal island market, outdoor equipment should also address enclosure ingress protection, corrosion, surge, anchoring, wind exposure, heat, humidity, and post-storm serviceability.
summary.zh: 面向巴哈马，EVSE安全证据应遵循120/240 V 60 Hz美洲市场通常预期的美国方向充电设备安全框架。交流EVSE通常按UL 2594评估，直流充电设备按UL 2202评估，安装细节则按当地接受的电气规范、项目规范和电力公司要求处理。由于巴哈马为飓风多发的沿海海岛市场，户外设备还应覆盖外壳防护、腐蚀、防浪涌、固定锚固、抗风暴暴露、热、湿度和风暴后可维护性。
summary.zht: 面向巴哈馬，EVSE安全證據應遵循120/240 V 60 Hz美洲市場通常預期的美國方向充電設備安全框架。交流EVSE通常按UL 2594評估，直流充電設備按UL 2202評估，安裝細節則按當地接受的電氣規範、項目規範和電力公司要求處理。由於巴哈馬為颶風多發的沿海海島市場，戶外設備還應覆蓋外殼防護、腐蝕、防浪湧、固定錨固、抗風暴暴露、熱、濕度和風暴後可維護性。

standards_or_laws: UL 2202 — Electric Vehicle Charging System Equipment
UL 2231 series — personnel protection systems for EV supply circuits where specified
IEC 61851 series — EV conductive charging system reference where accepted by project
Local electrical installation, utility, and building-permit requirements

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system general requirements, together with GB/T connector and DC communication standards. GB/T safety evidence is useful for engineering review but does not by itself establish compliance with UL 2594, UL 2202, local installation acceptance, or hurricane-prone outdoor installation conditions in the Bahamas.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统通用要求，并配套GB/T接口和直流通信标准。GB/T安全证据可用于工程审查，但其本身不能证明符合UL 2594、UL 2202、当地安装验收或巴哈马飓风多发户外安装条件。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統通用要求，並配套GB/T接口和直流通訊標準。GB/T安全證據可用於工程審查，但其本身不能證明符合UL 2594、UL 2202、當地安裝驗收或巴哈馬颶風多發戶外安裝條件。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare UL-direction safety reports or a clause-level gap matrix, protective-device ratings for 120/240 V 60 Hz service, ground-fault and personnel-protection evidence, enclosure and corrosion evidence, surge protection, thermal derating for humid outdoor conditions, installation manuals for local electricians, and documentation for BPL or project-owner review. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not a Bahamas safety-acceptance package.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备UL方向安全报告或逐条差距矩阵、适用于120/240 V 60 Hz供电的保护器件额定值、接地故障和人员保护证据、外壳和腐蚀证据、防浪涌、适用于潮湿户外环境的热降额、面向当地电工的安装说明，以及供BPL或项目业主审查的文件。单独GB/T 18487报告并不是巴哈马安全验收资料包。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備UL方向安全報告或逐條差距矩陣、適用於120/240 V 60 Hz供電的保護器件額定值、接地故障和人員保護證據、外殼和腐蝕證據、防浪湧、適用於潮濕戶外環境的熱降額、面向當地電工的安裝說明，以及供BPL或項目業主審查的文件。單獨GB/T 18487報告並不是巴哈馬安全驗收資料包。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but safety-critical — UL-direction EVSE safety evidence, local electrical installation acceptance, and hurricane-prone outdoor suitability should be confirmed with BBSQ, BPL, the authority having jurisdiction, importer, and project owner
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not a direct substitute for UL 2594 / UL 2202 or Bahamas installation acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as an engineering baseline only. Bahamas-facing documentation should include UL-direction EVSE safety evidence, 120/240 V 60 Hz protective-device review, outdoor enclosure and corrosion evidence, surge protection, and local installation acceptance documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为工程基线。面向巴哈马的文件应包括UL方向EVSE安全证据、120/240 V 60 Hz保护器件复核、户外外壳和腐蚀证据、防浪涌，以及当地安装验收文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為工程基線。面向巴哈馬的文件應包括UL方向EVSE安全證據、120/240 V 60 Hz保護器件復核、戶外外殼和腐蝕證據、防浪湧，以及當地安裝驗收文件。
